---
title: "Projections"
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.8/css/jquery.dataTables.min.css">
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.datatables.net/responsive/2.5.0/css/responsive.dataTables.min.css">

        <script src="https://code.jquery.com/jquery-3.7.1.min.js"></script>
        <script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.8/js/jquery.dataTables.min.js"></script>
        <script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/responsive/2.5.0/js/dataTables.responsive.min.js"></script>
---

<style>
.projection-button-row {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 10px;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
}

.proj-btn {
  background: #13294b;
  color: white;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 10px 16px;
  font-weight: 600;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.proj-btn:hover {
  opacity: 0.9;
}

.proj-btn.active {
  background: #4b9cd3;
  color: #000;
}

#projection-filters {
  margin-bottom: 18px;
}

#projection-table-wrapper {
  overflow-x: auto;
  margin-top: 10px;
}

table.dataTable thead th,
table.dataTable tbody td {
  white-space: nowrap;
}
</style>

## Transfer Portal Projections

Use the buttons below to switch between projection views.

<div class="projection-button-row">
  <button class="proj-btn active" data-view="transfer">Transfer Likelihood</button>
  <button class="proj-btn" data-view="return">Return / Leave</button>
  <button class="proj-btn" data-view="destination">Destination Tier</button>
  <button class="proj-btn" data-view="bpm">Projected BPM</button>
</div>

<div id="projection-filters">
  Filters coming next.
</div>

<div id="projection-table-wrapper">
  <table id="projection-table" class="display nowrap" style="width:100%">
    <thead></thead>
    <tbody></tbody>
  </table>
</div>
